nodes.label: Visual Contract
nodes.rationale: Match exported pixels and behavior first when implementation choices conflict.

nodes.label: Responsive Contract
nodes.rationale: Validate one adaptive web experience across modern mobile, tablet, laptop, desktop, and wide desktop viewports.

nodes.label: Design Fidelity Contract
nodes.rationale: Extract tokens, preserve copy, layout geometry, accessibility semantics, and interactive affordances before refactoring internals.
